scorecardMd:
# Launch Rehearsal — Scorecard

| Field | Value |
|-------|--------|
| **Run ID** | `lr-self-20260531-181658` |
| **Date** | 2026-05-31 |
| **Target** | http://127.0.0.1:8081 |
| **Product** | Launch Rehearsal Dashboard |
| **Outcome** | complete |
| **Duration** | 515s |

---

## Executive summary

| | |
|---|---|
| **Readiness** | **Red** |
| **Top blocker** | Slow step completion |
| **Top delight** | Clear navigation structure |
| **Issues** | 16 |
| **Delights** | 9 |

| **Pages crawled** | 14 |
| **Auto journeys added** | 3 |
| **Parallel seeds** | 1 |
| **Flaky steps** | 9 |

---

## Persona × journey matrix

| Journey | P1 First-time | P2 Daily | P3 Admin |
|---------|--------|--------|--------|
| **j1-command-center** Command center | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j2-runs** Runs list | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j3-compare** Compare runs | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j4-init-dogfood** Init dogfood flow | **Pass** | **Partial** | **Partial** |
| **j5-runner-selftest** Runner self-test trigger | **Pass** | **Partial** | **Pass** |
| **j6-trends** Trends monitoring | **Pass** | **Partial** | **Pass** |
| **auto-j1-dashboard** Auto: Dashboard | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **auto-j3-explore** Auto: Explore /recommendations | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |
| **auto-j5-explore** Auto: Explore /library | **Pass** | **Pass** | **Pass** |

---

## Site map (crawl)

# Site map

**Origin:** http://127.0.0.1:8081  
**Pages crawled:** 14  

## Hub pages (most outbound links)

- `/` — Command center — Launch Rehearsal
- `/compare` — Compare runs — Launch Rehearsal
- `/library` — Journey library — Launch Rehearsal
- `/agents` — Agents — Launch Rehearsal
- `/alerts` — Alerts — Launch Rehearsal
- `/cli` — CLI — Launch Rehearsal
- `/config` — Workspace — Launch Rehearsal
- `/init` — Init wizard — Launch Rehearsal

## All pages

| Path | Title | Depth | Links | Forms | Words |
|------|-------|-------|-------|-------|-------|
| `/` | Command center — Launch Rehearsal | 0 | 29 | 0 | 358 |
| `/agents` | Agents — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 469 |
| `/alerts` | Alerts — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 151 |
| `/cli` | CLI — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 334 |
| `/compare` | Compare runs — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 18 | 0 | 256 |
| `/config` | Workspace — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 356 |
| `/init` | Init wizard — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 17 | 0 | 267 |
| `/integrations` | Integrations — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 124 |
| `/library` | Journey library — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 18 | 0 | 160 |
| `/recommendations` | Recommendations — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 23 | 0 | 249 |
| `/runner` | Runner — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 17 | 0 | 266 |
| `/sitemap` | Site map — Launch Rehearsal | 1 | 16 | 0 | 55 |
| `/trends` |  | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| `/workflows` |  | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 |

---

## Detected workflows

| Type | Path | Title | Signals |
|------|------|-------|---------|
| dashboard | `/config` | Workspace — Launch Rehearsal | — |
| integration | `/integrations` | Integrations — Launch Rehearsal | — |

---

## Multi-agent collaboration

| Agent | Role | Summary |
|-------|------|---------|
| `crawler` | Site structure discovery | Crawled 14 pages; 0 auth-gated; 0 orphans |
| `workflow` | Workflow & journey planning | Detected workflow types: dashboard, integration |
| `journey-runner` | E2E journey execution | Executed 60 steps across 9 journeys (4 failures, 9 flaky steps, seeds=1, viewpor |
| `performance-v1` | Web Vitals (lab) | Web Vitals captured for 9 journey(s); no threshold breaches |
| `persona-p1-evaluator` | Evaluator: First-time evaluator (prospect / new user) | Analysis from prospect / new user perspective |
| `persona-p2-operator` | Evaluator: Daily operator (power user) | Analysis from power user perspective |
| `persona-p3-admin` | Evaluator: Admin / buyer (IT admin) | Analysis from IT admin perspective |
| `llm-p1-evaluator` | LLM evaluator: First-time evaluator | Landing page and core journeys work on desktop/tablet but mobile navigation fail |
| `llm-p2-operator` | LLM evaluator: Daily operator | Daily operator faces mobile navigation failures on core journeys and broken tren |
| `llm-p3-admin` | LLM evaluator: Admin / buyer | Admin dashboard loads correctly across desktops and tablets, but mobile navigati |
| `synthesizer` | Cross-agent synthesis | Synthesized 16 issues, 9 delights from 10 agent reports |

---

## Dimension rollup (automated subset)

| Dimension | Score 1–5 | Signal |
|-----------|-----------|--------|
| Functionality | 4 | 93% steps pass; 4 failures |
| UI/UX | 4 | 0 unlabeled buttons; ~6396ms avg step |
| Information clarity | 2 | 4 sparse-content pages |

---

## Issues (evidence-bound)

### P1

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I8** | Crawl found error pages — Paths: /trends, /workflows | p3-admin | `crawl-graph` |
| **I12** | Mobile navigation fails on multiple core journeys — Navigating to command center, runs, and compare pages on mobile returns null title and fails, preventing daily operators from using core features on mobile devices. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |

### P2

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I3** | Console errors on page — 1 console error(s): Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error) | p2-operator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s5-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I4** | Console noise spike across run — Captured 1 console error(s) and 8 warning(s) across canonical steps — review network-log and step artifacts. | p2-operator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I5** | Flaky step (navigate) — FLAKY: outcomes differ across seeds (fail, pass). | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I6** | Flaky step (navigate) — FLAKY: outcomes differ across seeds (fail, pass). | p1-evaluator | `j2-runs-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I7** | Flaky step (navigate) — FLAKY: outcomes differ across seeds (fail, pass). | p1-evaluator | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I9** | Mobile navigation fails on key journeys — The first mobile step on command center, runs, and compare pages returns a failure (null title, blank excerpt) before eventually loading on the second step. This creates a poor first impression for mobile users. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **I10** | Error pages at /trends and /workflows — Sitemap indicates that /trends and /workflows paths return errors, preventing users from accessing trend analysis and workflow views. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I13** | Tablet navigation to runs page fails — On tablet, navigating to the runs page fails with null title, impacting reliability for tablet users. | p2-operator | `j2-runs-p1-evaluator-s1-tablet-seed1-loop1` |
| **I14** | Error pages for /trends and /workflows — Sitemap indicates /trends and /workflows paths return errors, limiting access to trend analysis and workflow management. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I15** | Inconsistent workspace/environment labelling between desktop and mobile/tablet — On desktop views, the sidebar shows 'Faculty-Dashboard-Eight Workspace' and live run data. On mobile and tablet, the same pages display 'Acme Inc. app.acme.io' with 'API offline — showing Acme mock' banner. This inconsistency undermines trust signals for an admin verifying access boundaries. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s2-mobile-seed1-loop1` |

### P3

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I1** | Slow step completion — Step took 16668ms (>8s perceived delay threshold). | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I2** | Console warnings on page — 8 warning(s): Generated path "/runs/" for route "/runs/$runId" matched route "/runs/" instead. This can happen when multiple route tem | p2-operator | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I11** | Mock data displayed on tablet/mobile without clear indication (hypothesis) — Tablet and mobile views of the init wizard show 'API offline — showing Acme mock' which may confuse first-time evaluators expecting live data. | p1-evaluator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s1-tablet-seed1-loop1` |
| **I16** | Mobile navigation failures on primary pages (hypothesis) — Navigate actions for command center, runs, and compare pages on mobile returned 'fail' outcomes, though subsequent waits succeeded. This may indicate intermittent loading issues on small screens. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |

---

## Delights & strengths (required)

| ID | Delight | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **D1** | Clear navigation structure — Page has 16 links and 1 headings. | p1-evaluator, p2-operator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D2** | Informative landing content — Page includes headings and substantive body copy for first-time evaluators. | p1-evaluator | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D3** | Accessible form labels — All 2 form inputs have labels or placeholders. | p3-admin | `auto-j3-explore-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D4** | Fast interactions for repeat tasks — 34 steps completed under 3s. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s2-tablet-seed1-loop1` |
| **D5** | Clear readiness score on landing page — The command center immediately shows a 'Latest run' with a numerical readiness score and color indicator, giving quick insight into product health. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s2-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **D6** | Cross-device consistency of init wizard — The init wizard works smoothly across desktop, tablet, and mobile, making it easy for new users to get started. | p1-evaluator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **D7** | Init wizard works reliably across all devices — The init wizard journey (j4) loads and functions correctly on desktop, tablet, and mobile, providing a consistent setup experience. | p2-operator | `j4-init-dogfood-p1-evaluator-s1-mobile-seed1-loop1` |
| **D8** | Readiness score and blocker/delight counts visible at a glance — The command center displays a readiness percentage and counts of blockers and delights for the latest run, enabling quick trust assessment for an admin. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
